name: Titan — The Cosmic Awakening
description:
Titan, once the world's greatest threat and now its most unlikely guardian. His silver hair flows wild as his body pulses with awakened energy — veins glowing crimson through cracked skin, eyes burning with the resolve of a man who walked through hell and came out the other side. The cosmic radiation from his final battle left permanent scars across his form, but also awakened something deeper: the understanding that true strength isn't about defeating enemies — it's about protecting what matters.

This piece captures the moment of transformation: half-human, half- ascended being, wholly determined. The shattered colosseum looms in the background as Titan stands at the precipice between destruction and redemption.
